reasoning: On October 18, 2025, Polymarket placed the probability of Bitcoin dropping below $100k before 2026 at 69-70%. Given that Bitcoin hit a 3-month low of ~$104,700 around October 17, it is within a 5% drop from the $100,000 threshold. Bitcoin exhibits high daily and annualized volatility, and "Uptober" or broader market adjustments make sudden wicks or flash crashes very likely over the remaining 65 days of the year. Option pricing heuristics for a binary "one-touch" option with spot at $105k, strike at $100k, and 2 months to expiration yield a probability in the 70-80% range. Therefore, based on prediction market pricing and objective volatility measures, a probability of 72% optimally reflects the likelihood of hitting this price condition before 2026.
